title: Store Item Tests
summary: Contains tests for adding, merging, and removing items from a store. Uses get and removeItem methods to verify functionality.

title: Store Validation Tests
summary: Tests invalid quantity, empty product, total calculation, and item count for a store. Provides store creation and basic operations add, total, itemCount.

title: Registercartserviceserver
summary: 3 symbol(s) (function) from main.go, cart_grpc.pb.go, cart.go. Primary: main.go.

title: Store Clear Tests
summary: Tests the clear functionality of a store. Uses the clear method to reset the store state.

title: Cart Service Client
summary: Provides a client for cart service with methods to add items, get cart, and clear cart. Also includes functions for cart total and item count calculation.
